fields.name: Studio Session
fields.description: Standard studio photo session packages. Good for solo, couple, family, birthdays, and quick studio shoots.

fields.name: Photo Service Booking
fields.description: Full-service booking process for events and extended photoshoots. Includes event/program, booking confirmation, availability, shoot layout, setup, printing, and final file record.

fields.name: Solo Package
fields.inclusions: 1 person, 5 shots, studio lighting, backdrop selection, basic retouching, digital soft copies

fields.name: Mr. & Ms. / Couple Package
fields.inclusions: 2 persons, 10 shots, studio lighting, backdrop selection, basic retouching, digital soft copies

fields.name: Mr. & Ms. Friends Package
fields.inclusions: 3-5 persons, 15 shots, studio lighting, backdrop selection, basic retouching, digital soft copies

fields.name: Family Package
fields.inclusions: 2-6 persons, 15 shots, studio lighting, backdrop selection, basic retouching, digital soft copies

fields.name: Birthday Package
fields.inclusions: 1-4 persons, 15 shots, studio lighting, backdrop selection, basic retouching, digital soft copies, birthday props

fields.name: Standard Event Package
fields.inclusions: 2 hours coverage, availability validation, layout setup, printing coordination, final digital file record

fields.name: Photo Supplies
fields.description: Studio printing paper, frames, and print assets

fields.question: What are your operating hours?
fields.answer: CAV Photo Studio and Caf� is open daily from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM. The caf� accepts orders until 7:30 PM, and the last studio session booking is at 7:00 PM.

fields.question: How do I book a studio session?
fields.answer: You can book directly from our website! Simply log in, navigate to 'Book Session' from your dashboard, choose your desired Service (Self-Shoot or Boutique Portrait) and Package, select an available date and time, and submit your booking.

fields.question: What packages do you offer for photo studio?
fields.answer: We offer 'Self-Shoot Studio' starting at PHP 500 (Duo pack at PHP 800) and 'Boutique Portrait' starting at PHP 1,500. Each package includes specific session lengths, digital soft copies, and physical printouts. You can see full package details in our portal under Packages.

fields.question: Can we walk in for caf� or photo studio?
fields.answer: Yes! The caf� is open to walk-ins anytime during operating hours. For the photo studio, we accept walk-ins depending on room availability, but we highly recommend booking online in advance to secure your slot.

fields.question: Where is CAV located?
fields.answer: We are located at 123 Capstone Drive, Barangay Loyola, Quezon City, Metro Manila. We have free parking spaces in front of the shop!
